title: Christian Brighty Outlord Work In Progress
description: Creator and star of BBC Radio 4’s The Many Wrongs of Lord Christian Brighty (Nominated Best Radio Comedy - Chortle Awards 2025) returns to Brighton to take on the biggest cause of inequality: himself. Can Lord Brighty maintain the status quo? If wealth won’t, can love trickle down? And WHO is the Masked Magpie? Batman meets Bridgerton in a show that isn’t what Brighton needs, but is what he thinks it deserves. "The outrageously silly meets the eye-wateringly witty" ★★★★ (Scotsman) "You'll never look at a period drama the same way after this" ★★★★ (Reviews Hub) ★★★★ Telegraph ★★★★ List ★★★★★ Broadway Baby ★★★★★ Voice Mag Best New Show Nominee (Leicester Comedy Festival 2022) Best Reviewed Shows (BCG, Edfringe 2022) Directed by Amy Greaves
content_warnings: Partial Nudity, Strong Language, Loud Noises

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
